list.name: Changes
list.comment: Add IMU odometry configuration options; refactor drive and kinematics interfaces to return motor command results

task.summary: Refactor motor calibration and drive configuration: update Motor class to include calibration parameters and remove unnecessary methods
Add Docker support for building and deploying Python library
Rename config file to raccoon.project.yml, update Python script usage, adjust Python version requirement, and enhance logging initialization
Implement kinematics for differential and mecanum drive systems, including command application and state estimation; enhance motor control with limits and hard stop functionality
Add mission module with logging and LCM integration; refactor motor and velocity controller classes
Enhance logging and configuration for drive system; refactor motor and velocity controller classes to improve clarity and functionality
Add motion module with drive straight functionality and IMU integration; enhance bindings for Python
Update IMU subscription topic from 'orientation' to 'quaternion' in LcmReader
Add odometry module with IMU integration; enhance Python bindings and refactor drive motion classes
Add IMU odometry configuration options; refactor drive and kinematics interfaces to return motor command results

MESSAGE.value: Refactor motor calibration and drive configuration: update Motor class to include calibration parameters and remove unnecessary methods
Add Docker support for building and deploying Python library
Rename config file to raccoon.project.yml, update Python script usage, adjust Python version requirement, and enhance logging initialization
Implement kinematics for differential and mecanum drive systems, including command application and state estimation; enhance motor control with limits and hard stop functionality
Add mission module with logging and LCM integration; refactor motor and velocity controller classes
Enhance logging and configuration for drive system; refactor motor and velocity controller classes to improve clarity and functionality
Add motion module with drive straight functionality and IMU integration; enhance bindings for Python
Update IMU subscription topic from 'orientation' to 'quaternion' in LcmReader
Add odometry module with IMU integration; enhance Python bindings and refactor drive motion classes
Add IMU odometry configuration options; refactor drive and kinematics interfaces to return motor command results

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Add IMU odometry configuration options; refactor drive and kinematics interfaces to return motor command results
